name: MSA Negotiation Baseline - Approved Position.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
CTR-011  MSA Negotiation Baseline
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
MSA Negotiation Baseline — Approved Position
Clause baseline used by Meridian Legal and Procurement when reviewing strategic vendor contracts.
Document ID
CTR-011
Owner
General Counsel
Status
Approved Baseline
Effective Date
2024-01-05
Applies To
Strategic cloud and managed AI vendors
Classification
Confidential
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Purpose
This baseline captures Meridian’s non-negotiable fallback language for strategic software and managed-services
transactions. It is used as the approved comparator for contract redlining, automated comparison, and executive escalation.
Approved Position Summary
Clause Topic
Approved Meridian Baseline
Liability Cap
General cap equal to 2× annual contract value; unlimited liability only for fraud or willful
misconduct.
Termination Notice
Either party may decline renewal with 30 days written notice.
Derivative IP
Customer retains all rights to derivative works, playbooks, schemas, and outputs generated
from Customer content.
Incident Notification
Critical incidents involving Customer Data must be notified within 24 hours of confirmation;
material service incidents within 48 hours.
Audit Rights
Customer may perform a remote control review for material concerns and receive evidence
packages annually.
Cross-Border Transfers
EU personal data remains in the EEA unless SCC Appendix C is attached and approved.
This document is the main “Document B” reference for comparison diffs. It resolves the same clause
areas that are weak in the vendor draft.
Approval Chain
Role
Name
Status / Date
General Counsel
Daniel Brooks
Approved — 2024-01-05
VP, Procurement
Maria Santos
Approved — 2024-01-05
Chief Information Security Officer
Elena Petrov
Approved — 2024-01-06
